a:r.a:t: Q12: My compensation plan document clearly communicates plan details.

Note: Average scores reflect the weighted mean of responses on a 5-point Likert scale (5 = Strongly Agree to 1 = Strongly Disagree), based on the distribution of all responses within each grouping. Neutral responses are included in the scoring as “3” but are excluded from the chart.
Compensation plan documents are generally clear across tenure groups, with consistently high understanding of plan details
Minimal variation by tenure, indicating consistent communication of plan details across experience levels
